title: Onboarding - Animations
scenario: Onboarding animations fail to play on one or more screens during first-time app setup in Poly Studio Mobile
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time
Observe the initial setup loading screen
Observe the 'Well hello, first thing first...' screen
expected: Onboarding animations play smoothly and correctly on all screens: initial setup loading screen, 'Well hello, first thing first...', 'Up-to-Date', 'Personal', and 'Organized' screens.
